reasoning: `implies_apply` is external_body bridging `p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex)` — which evaluates a fresh closure from `TempPred::new` — to the direct modus ponens conclusion. This is an unverified trust assumption resolving the intensional closure gap.

`tla_forall_leads_to_equality1` is external_body forcing `==` (intensional equality) between two `TempPred`s built from deeply nested, structurally distinct closures — `tla_forall(|a| a_to_p(a).leads_to(q))` vs `tla_exists(a_to_p).leads_to(q)`. This is a substantial unverified trust assumption equating complex closure trees.

`spec_entails_tla_forall` is external_body bridging pointwise entailment to entailment of `tla_forall`, where the `tla_forall` closure wrapping introduces an intensional gap between `forall |a| spec.entails(a_to_p(a))` and `spec.entails(tla_forall(a_to_p))`. This is a separate unverified trust assumption.
